description: Charak Hospital Lucknow — NABH-accredited multispeciality hospital at Hardoi Road, Dubagga offering 24/7 emergency care, 27+ specialities, 45+ expert doctors, kidney transplant, cardiac surgery and advanced diagnostics.

RL Ram Lakhan Yadav Google · Verified Patient FAQ Frequently Asked Questions Common questions about Charak Hospital, Lucknow. Where is Charak Hospital located in Lucknow? + Charak Hospital is located at Hardoi Road, near Safaid Masjid, Dubagga, Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh – 226003 . It is accessible from the city centre, Chinhat, Indira Nagar, and the Lucknow–Sitapur highway. Does Charak Hospital provide 24/7 emergency care? + Yes. Charak Hospital operates a round-the-clock Emergency & Trauma Care unit with ICU, ventilators, and a dedicated emergency team. Helpline: 0522-666-4444 . What specialities does Charak Hospital offer? + 27+ specialities including cardiac surgery, neurosciences, kidney transplant, oncology, orthopaedics, pulmonology, gastroenterology, nephrology, obstetrics & gynaecology, paediatrics, ENT, ophthalmology, dermatology, psychiatry, bariatric surgery and more. Does Charak Hospital accept cashless insurance or ECHS? + Yes. Charak Hospital is empanelled with major Third Party Administrators (TPAs) and insurance companies for cashless treatment. It also accepts ECHS (Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme) referrals. How can I book an appointment? + You can book online using the form at the top of this page, call 0522-666-4444 , or walk in to the hospital at Hardoi Road, Dubagga, Lucknow. OPD hours vary by department — see the OPD Schedule . Does Charak Hospital have a dialysis unit? + Yes. The Department of Nephrology includes a 24/7 advanced dialysis unit with kidney transplant services managed by experienced nephrologists from SGPGI and other premier institutions. Get In Touch Visit Charak Hospital, Lucknow Open 24 hours, 7 days a week. Walk in anytime or call ahead.
